'''fawate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quantitively|quantitively]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quantitively|quantitively]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fawate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:fawate|fawate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fawatesher|fawatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawatesherĂ«m|fawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fawatero|fawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fawateshĂ«|fawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawateshĂ«m|fawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifawatero|gokifawatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifawateshĂ«|gokifawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifawateshĂ«m|gokifawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofawankerom|gofawankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofawankeshĂ«|gofawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofawankeshĂ«m|gofawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofawankeya|gofawankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fawaterom|fawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawatemu|fawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fawateya|fawateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifawaterom|gokifawaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifawatemu|gokifawatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifawateya|gokifawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:fawawate|fawawate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fawawatesher|fawawatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawawatesherĂ«m|fawawatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fawawatero|fawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fawawateshĂ«|fawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawawateshĂ«m|fawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifawawatero|gokifawawatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifawawateshĂ«|gokifawawateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifawawateshĂ«m|gokifawawateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofawawankerom|gofawawankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofawawankeshĂ«|gofawawankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofawawankeshĂ«m|gofawawankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofawawankeya|gofawawankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fawawaterom|fawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fawawatemu|fawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fawawateya|fawawateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifawawaterom|gokifawawaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifawawatemu|gokifawawatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifawawateya|gokifawawateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠte|fĂŠwĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠtesher|fĂŠwĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m|fĂŠwĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠtero|fĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|fĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|fĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠtero|gokifĂŠwĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«|gokifĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m|gokifĂŠwĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofĂŠwĂŠnkerom|gofĂŠwĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«|gofĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gofĂŠwĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofĂŠwĂŠnkeya|gofĂŠwĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠterom|fĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠtemu|fĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fĂŠwĂŠteya|fĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠterom|gokifĂŠwĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠtemu|gokifĂŠwĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifĂŠwĂŠteya|gokifĂŠwĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:fafwafte|fafwafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:fafwaftesher|fafwaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafwaftesherĂ«m|fafwaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafwaftero|fafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:fafwafteshĂ«|fafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafwafteshĂ«m|fafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafwaftero|gokifafwaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokifafwafteshĂ«|gokifafwafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafwafteshĂ«m|gokifafwafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gofafwafnkerom|gofafwafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofafwafnkeshĂ«|gofafwafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofafwafnkeshĂ«m|gofafwafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gofafwafnkeya|gofafwafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:fafwafterom|fafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:fafwaftemu|fafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:fafwafteya|fafwafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokifafwafterom|gokifafwafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokifafwaftemu|gokifafwaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokifafwafteya|gokifafwafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
